caption: The video captures a lively community meeting or lecture taking place in a well-lit conference room. A speaker, dressed in a light blue shirt and white cap, stands at a podium on the left side of the stage, addressing an engaged audience seated in rows of chairs. The audience members are actively participating, with several raising their hands to ask questions or make comments. On the right side of the stage, a sign language interpreter is present, ensuring accessibility for all attendees. The room has a warm ambiance with red walls adorned with framed pictures and a large window covered by blinds in the background. The overall atmosphere suggests a collaborative and interactive session, possibly organized by ORCA, as indicated by the logo in the bottom right corner of the screen.
